text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
This school is filled with nothing but the<n>best of
the best Umamusume...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
It makes my heart skip a beat. But I'm<n>not
scared... I'm excited.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Racing everyone here is so much fun,<n>even more
fun than back in Kasamatsu.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Watch me, Trainer. I swear... I will win!
